decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of creature removal, card advantage, and mana ramp. Utilizing cards like Meddling Mage and Swords to Plowshares to deal with threats, while using Survival of the Fittest to tutor for key creatures like Phyrexian Devourer and Terravore. The deck also includes mana acceleration with Birds of Paradise and Mox Diamond, as well as card draw with Sylvan Library. Additionally, the deck features land destruction with Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's mana base. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent through control and card advantage.

The main concept of this deck is to assemble a powerful combo using cards like Hermit Druid, Volrath's Shapeshifter, and Phyrexian Devourer to quickly fill the graveyard and then use cards like Animate Dead and Karmic Guide to bring back key creatures like Akroma or Triskelion. The deck also runs disruption spells like Cabal Therapy and Duress to control the opponent's hand, while utilizing cards like Birds of Paradise and Wall of Roots for mana ramp. Overall, the deck aims to efficiently set up a game-winning combo while disrupting the opponent's strategy.

This deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with creatures using cards like Zombie Infestation and Survival of the Fittest to create a steady stream of threats. By discarding creatures and utilizing recursion effects like Squee, Goblin Nabob and Genesis, the deck is able to overwhelm opponents with aggressive creatures like Wild Mongrel and Basking Rootwalla. The inclusion of disruptive spells like Cabal Therapy and Duress helps to disrupt opponents' game plans, while also providing some protection for the deck's own threats. The overall goal is to quickly build a board presence and close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The main concept of this deck revolves around utilizing enchantress cards to draw cards whenever an enchantment enters the battlefield. By combining enchantresses like Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence with powerful enchantments like Opalescence and Parallax Wave, the deck aims to create a strong card advantage engine. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Sterling Grove and Seal of Cleansing for protection and disruption. The ultimate goal is to assemble the key pieces needed to combo off and overwhelm the opponent with a board full of powerful enchantments.

The main focus of this Mono Black Control deck is to disrupt and control the opponent's resources through a combination of hand disruption, board wipes, and land destruction. By utilizing cards like Duress, Cabal Therapy, and Innocent Blood, the deck aims to strip the opponent of key cards and creatures while establishing a strong board presence with Mishra's Factory and Nether Spirit. Contamination and Zombie Infestation offer additional ways to lock down the board and maintain control. The deck's overall strategy is to grind out a win by outlasting the opponent and denying them resources.

This deck focuses on controlling the opponent's board with a combination of removal spells and hand disruption cards. It includes cards like Ravenous Baloth and Wall of Roots to stabilize the board and generate value over time. The main goal is to outvalue the opponent by continually stripping their resources through cards like Cabal Therapy and Duress, while also having access to graveyard recursion with cards like Recurring Nightmare. The deck also includes Pernicious Deed as a versatile board wipe option to deal with threats efficiently.

The main idea of this deck is to create a powerful enchantress engine that allows you to draw cards and generate mana by playing enchantments. By constantly drawing through your deck using cards like Mirri's Guile and Enchantress's Presence, you can quickly find your combo pieces like Opalescence and Parallax Wave to lock down your opponent or win the game. The deck also utilizes cards like Sterling Grove and Seal of Cleansing to protect your enchantments and disrupt your opponent's strategy, making it a versatile and powerful combo deck in the Premodern 1 vs 1 format.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly get out Phyrexian Dreadnought and then protect it with counterspells and disruption cards like Stifle. By combining the powerful Dreadnought with cards like Foil and Counterspell, the goal is to create a winning combo that overwhelms the opponent before they can respond. The deck also includes card draw and manipulation spells to help find the combo pieces quickly, ensuring a fast and efficient win condition.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize Oath of Druids to quickly put creatures onto the battlefield and use control cards such as Pyroclasm and Sphere of Resistance to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck also includes cards like Sylvan Library for card advantage and cards like Terravore and Winter's Grasp for additional threats. Additionally, the deck includes mana acceleration with Mox Diamond and land destruction with Wasteland to further control the game and maintain board advantage.

The deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bringing them back into play for a devastating board presence. By utilizing cards like Reanimate, Exhume, and Animate Dead, the deck seeks to cheat creatures like Akroma, Angel of Wrath and Multani, Maro-Sorcerer into play early on. To facilitate this strategy, the deck also includes spells like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal for fast mana acceleration. Additionally, cards like Careful Study and Cabal Therapy help with card selection and disruption, making the combo-reanimator archetype a formidable force in the Premodern 1 vs 1 format.

This deck focuses on controlling the game early on with removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Cataclysm, as well as disrupting opponents' mana bases with cards like Wasteland and Armageddon. The key strategy revolves around using Oath of Druids to cheat out powerful creatures like Exalted Angel and Terravore. The deck also includes cards like Sylvan Library and Call of the Herd to draw cards and generate additional threats. Overall, the deck aims to disrupt opponents' strategies while quickly establishing a dominant board presence.

The deck focuses on using Oath of Druids to cheat out powerful creatures like Terravore and Treetop Village early in the game. It also includes cards like Sphere of Resistance and Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's game plan and control the board. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with efficient threats and disrupt their strategy through land destruction and resource denial. Additionally, cards like Sylvan Library and Mox Diamond provide card advantage and mana acceleration. Overall, the deck is a versatile control archetype that aims to dominate the game through early creature presence and disruption.

This deck focuses on using the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to quickly overpower opponents. By stifling the Dreadnought's "when enters the battlefield" ability, players can easily put a powerful creature into play for only one mana. Additionally, the deck includes various card draw and counter spells to control the game and protect the combo. With the ability to quickly assemble the combo and disrupt opponents' plans, this deck aims to win the game before the opponent has a chance to respond.

The primary strategy of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful enchantments through cards like Attunement and Frantic Search, then use Replenish to bring them all back onto the battlefield at once. Cards like Opalescence and Parallax Wave provide strong synergy with this strategy, while cards like Decree of Silence and Seal of Cleansing offer disruption and protection. The deck also includes some counterspells and removal to control the game until the combo can be assembled. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful board state created through the Replenish combo.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive goblin tribal strategy. By utilizing powerful goblin creatures like Goblin Lackey, Goblin Piledriver, and Goblin Ringleader, the deck aims to quickly build a strong board presence and deal damage to the opponent before they can establish their own game plan. Supporting cards like Gempalm Incinerator and Siege-Gang Commander provide additional removal and reach to help close out the game. The inclusion of utility lands like Rishadan Port and Wasteland also disrupt the opponent's mana base, further enhancing the deck's aggressive strategy.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with early aggression and disruption. By using cards like Cabal Therapy, Duress, and Ravenous Rats to disrupt the opponent's hand, along with efficient creatures like Hypnotic Specter and Phyrexian Scuta, the deck aims to apply constant pressure while controlling the board. The inclusion of cards like Cursed Scroll and Graveborn Muse helps to maintain card advantage and provide additional reach in the late game. Overall, the deck is designed to quickly close out games through a mix of aggression and disruption.
